offer: Full-service digital solutions agency, AI-and-automation-first: AI automation, chatbot development, lead generation systems, digital marketing (ads, social media, SEO), CRM setup and automation, custom automation, web design/development, and other digital services.
role_rule: Only the founder/owner counts as a lead. Employees, marketing managers, or generic company pages are not leads.
in_scope: Agency owners: marketing, creative, design, PR, media, branding, content, video, web design agencies
Consultants (broad business sense): strategy, management, sales, finance, investment, HR, industry-specific consultancies
out_of_scope: AI companies, AI consultancies, AI agencies
IT companies, software development shops, dev agencies, IT services/consulting
Process optimization, business process / workflow / automation consultancies
Anyone whose own offer overlaps with ours — competitors, not clients
Staffing/temp/recruitment agencies (Zeitarbeit, Personaldienstleister) and employment centers
Franchise branches with no local decision-maker
Chains and multi-location networks (fitness chains, studio networks, retail chains) — the local Geschäftsführer is a chain executive, not a founder

firmographics.revenue_note: Solo to lower-mid-market. Missing revenue/employee data is NOT disqualifying — score on available signals and state confidence.

hard_disqualifiers: Business inactive, in liquidation, or deleted per registry (Handelsregister / North Data)
No phone AND no email (phone matters most: German law restricts cold email, calls come first)
positive_signals: Visible service pages and portfolio/case studies
Founder with a personal brand (visible on site, LinkedIn, talks)
Visible manual processes / dated website tech = automation upside
negative_signals: Website 'coming soon' or last updated years ago
No Impressum (for German companies — legally required, its absence is a red flag)
Aggregator-only presence (only Yelp/Instagram, no own site)

scoring.rules: Out-of-scope industry caps the score at 20 regardless of seniority. Any hard disqualifier = 0. In-scope + founder identified + contactable by phone starts at 70; adjust with signals and firmographics.

per_run_overrides: Merge any run-specific criteria the user states (e.g. 'website agencies, ~100k/month revenue, ~5 employees') over this file for that run only.
